name: Leftover Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Head fresh broccoli, cut into 1-inch florets
3 Carrots, peeled and sliced thin on the diagonal
2 cups Leftover ham, cut into julienne
3 cups to 4 cups leftover BBQ sauce.
recipeInstructions:
1. Start cooking the spaghetti first according to directions.
2. In a wok on high heat, stir fry the vegetables in the peanut oil until crisp tender. Do not over cook!
3. Add ham, drained spaghetti, seasonings, and BBQ sauce. Mix gently and heat through.
4. Serve immediately.
